description: Roleplay prompt: Studio Portrait with Cinematic Lighting and Bold Color Background
template: Ultra-realistic cinematic studio portrait of a stylish man wearing thin round metal eyeglasses, minimal navy blazer over a black crew-neck shirt. Shot from a slightly low angle with confident, thoughtful expressions and subtle pose variations. Dramatic warm orange–red gradient background, bold color contrast. Soft key light from the front with warm rim lighting sculpting the jawline and cheekbones, deep shadows for a moody editorial feel. Natural skin texture, sharp facial details, realistic hair strands, premium DSLR look, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens aesthetic, fashion editorial photography, modern intellectual vibe, high contrast, ultra-high resolution.
